generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network on Physical Twin collecting operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController, MonitorEnabler, PredictiveSimulator
]

instance PhysicalGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model representing physical dimensions of the system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController, MonitorEnabler, PredictiveSimulator
]

instance DynamicBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController, MonitorEnabler, PredictiveSimulator
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting anomalies in system behavior using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system states from sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance parameters using simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated controller for adjusting system parameters based on monitoring data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance MonitorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for continuously assessing system safety and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveSimulator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for simulating system behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for updating model parameters to maintain accuracy; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting anomalies in system behavior; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for estimating current system states; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing system performance parameters; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated service for adjusting system parameters based on monitoring; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedCorrectiveAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous assessment of safety and operational efficiency; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight, ManualCorrectiveAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for forecasting system behavior through simulation; target users are engineers and operators utilizing this service for system maintenance, decision-making, and performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorForecastingInsight
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of model accuracy based on calibration"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies in system behavior based on sensor data"
]

instance SystemStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system using state estimator algorithms"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized performance parameters for system efficiency"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in system operation"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency of the system"
]

instance BehaviorForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted system behavior from predictive simulations"
]

instance AutomatedCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment to correct system violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human-initiated adjustment to correct system violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment with parameter estimates derived from sensor data. Monitors use this data to check system performance against safety and optimality criteria, triggering corrective actions upon violation detection."
]
